parameters.query:
SELECT d.id, d.crm_id, d.name, d.stage, d.amount, d.probability,
       d.close_date, d.last_activity_at, d.stage_entered_at,
       d.days_in_stage, d.raw,
       l.name as contact_name, l.email as contact_email, l.role as contact_role
FROM deals d
LEFT JOIN leads l ON l.crm_id = (d.raw->>'contact_crm_id') AND l.tenant_id = d.tenant_id
WHERE d.tenant_id = '$(TENANT_ID)'
  AND d.status = 'open'
ORDER BY d.days_in_stage DESC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT content, metadata FROM memory_chunks
WHERE tenant_id = '$(TENANT_ID)'
  AND metadata->>'type' = 'deal_unblock'
ORDER BY (metadata->>'outcome_score')::int DESC
LIMIT 3;

additionalFields.name: data
additionalFields.value: ={"deal_id": "{{$('Build NBA Prompt (UC5)').first().json.id}}", "deal_name": "{{$('Build NBA Prompt (UC5)').first().json.name}}", "analysis": "{{$('Python — Validate NBA').first().json.output}}"}

meta.description: UC5 NBA + UC6 detect stuck + UC7 unblock recommendation. Claude analyzes, Python validates, Supabase stores, Slack delivers.
